source_pr.title: vendor: update goleveldb/memdb and tipb/go-binlog packages
source_pr.body:
memdb introduces a bitRand for cheaper random int generator.
go-binlog updates protobuf for PumpServer interface add PullBinlogs method.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Map/dict iteration order is not stable across runs. This PR stabilizes it by: vendor: update goleveldb/memdb and tipb/go-binlog packages.
fix_pattern: vendor: update goleveldb/memdb and tipb/go-binlog packages
